fields.label: Station Name
fields.description: e.g. Juice Bar, Sandwich, Shawarma, Hot Kitchen

fields.label: Outlet
fields.description: Leave empty to make this station available to every outlet.

fields.label: Station Type
fields.description: Printer stations receive KOT tickets through the local bridge; Kitchen Display stations show them on the KDS board (filterable per station).

fields.label: Bridge Device Name
fields.description: The device name this station's printer is registered under in the local hardware bridge (the bridge holds the printer's LAN IP/port). One bridge serves all stations in a shop.

fields.label: Default Station
fields.description: Items whose item group matches no routing rule fall back here — nothing ever silently drops.
